recommendations.title: Geography Club
recommendations.overview: A coming-of-age movie that tells a story unfolding in every high school around the country -- a story of kids hiding their true identities in plain sight, even as they feverishly pursue their hearts' desires.

recommendations.title: Don't Breathe 2
recommendations.overview: The Blind Man has been hiding out for several years in an isolated cabin and has taken in and raised a young girl orphaned from a devastating house fire. Their quiet life together is shattered when a group of criminals kidnap the girl, forcing the Bl

recommendations.title: Texas Chainsaw Massacre
recommendations.overview: After nearly 50 years of hiding, Leatherface returns to terrorize a group of idealistic influencers who accidentally disrupt his carefully shielded world in a remote Texas town.

recommendations.title: The Body
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, on Halloween night, a hitman tries to transport a corpse in plain sight, but people he stumbles upon on the street, believing that his sophisticated appearance is a magnificent disguise, constantly stand in his way to congratulate him

recommendations.title: Return to Sender
recommendations.overview: A nurse mistakes a stranger who pays her a visit for her blind date and soon, the man rapes her and turns her life upside down. The woman works to reclaim her life and exact revenge on her assailant after he's paroled from prison.

recommendations.title: Julia's Eyes
recommendations.overview: Julia, a woman suffering from a degenerative sight disease, finds her blind sister Sara hung in a basement. Despite all signs pointing to suicide, Julia decides to investigate what she intuitively feels is a murder case.

recommendations.title: Birdemic 2: The Resurrection
recommendations.overview: A platoon of eagles and vultures attack Hollywood, California. Why did the eagles and vultures attack? Who will survive?

recommendations.title: My Favorite Wife
recommendations.overview: Years after she was presumed dead in a shipwreck, Ellen Arden returns home to the surprise of her husband recently remarrying. But he too gets a shock when he learns that Ellen spent her time alone on an island with another man.

recommendations.title: The Birds
recommendations.overview: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.

recommendations.title: The Babadook
recommendations.overview: A grieving single mother and her child fall into a deep well of paranoia when an eerie children's book manifests in their home.
